title: BOLSIUS Rustic Shimmer Metallic Candle 130MM x 68MM Christmas Dinner Table Setting Xmas Festive Pillar Candles (Ivory)
features: PACKAGE DETAILS - Available in 5 trendy colours, each candle is sold individually.
RUSTIC AND TRENDY DESIGN - Bolsius's Shimmer collection adds a bit of shimmer and shine to your interiors! These rustic candles all have a shimmering metallic shine.

ECO FRIENDLY AND VEGAN - Inspired by textures and colour tones from nature and made with love for people and planet. Without palm oil and animal fat, but with natural, vegan wax from olive, sunflower or rapeseed oil. Let your home sparkle!
CHRISTMAS - The perfect festive gift, these rustic candles will brighten up your dinner table.
